    Index

    A B C D E F G H I J L M N O P R S T U V W 
    Alle Klassen und Schnittstellen|Alle Packages|Konstantenfeldwerte|Serialisierte Form

    I

    id - Variable in Klasse boardLogic.Node
     
    ImaginativePlayer - Klasse in players
    ImaginativePlayer is a subclass of PlayerEntity that represents a player capable of planning moves based on the rules of the game without performing them.
    ImaginativePlayer(PlayerEntity) - Konstruktor für Klasse players.ImaginativePlayer
    Constructs an ImaginativePlayer with the given PlayerEntity.
    initializeBoard() - Methode in Klasse boardLogic.BoardManager
    Initializes the board by creating Node and establishing connections between them.
    initializeListeners(GUIBoard) - Methode in Klasse boardLogic.GameManager
    Initializes listeners for player moves and removals on the provided GUI board.
    initializeMills() - Methode in Klasse boardLogic.BoardManager
    Initializes the potential mills on the game board by defining all possible combinations of node groupings that form a mill.
    initialTime - Variable in Klasse boardLogic.TurnTimer
     
    initNodePositions() - Methode in Klasse view.GUIBoard
    Initialize the Map with 24 Entries, with a specific position (Point) on the Board The points are necessary for Mouse listeners.
    initStoneSlots() - Methode in Klasse view.GUIBoard
    Initialize the Array with 9 Stones, with a specific position (Point) on the Board The points are necessary for Mouse listeners.
    instance - Statische Variable in Klasse boardLogic.BoardManager
     
    instance - Statische Variable in Klasse boardLogic.GameManager
     
    instance - Statische Variable in Klasse boardLogic.RuleManager
     
    instance - Statische Variable in Klasse view.GUI
     
    isGameOver(PlayerEntity, PlayerEntity) - Methode in Klasse boardLogic.RuleManager
    Checks if the game is over and sets the winner if so.
    isInMill(int, int[]) - Methode in Klasse difficulties.DifficultyStrategy
    Checks if the given id is present in the specified mill array.
    isMoveValid(PlayerEntity, Node, Node) - Methode in Klasse boardLogic.RuleManager
    Checks if the intended move is valid for the current game phase.
    isOccupied() - Methode in Klasse boardLogic.Node
    Checks whether this node contains a Stone or not.
    isPlayerBlocked(PlayerEntity) - Methode in Klasse boardLogic.RuleManager
    Helper method for RuleManager.isGameOver(PlayerEntity, PlayerEntity) method.
    isPlayerGameOver(PlayerEntity) - Methode in Klasse boardLogic.RuleManager
    Helper method for RuleManager.isGameOver(PlayerEntity, PlayerEntity) method.
    isRemovalValid(PlayerEntity, Node) - Methode in Klasse boardLogic.RuleManager
    Checks if the removal of a stone is valid.
    isStalemate() - Methode in Klasse boardLogic.RuleManager
    Helper method for RuleManager.isGameOver(PlayerEntity, PlayerEntity) method.
    A B C D E F G H I J L M N O P R S T U V W
